hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; cd "/Users/a1/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/TaskFlow" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git add "$f" 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; git commit -m "Auto-save: $(basename "$f")" 2>/dev/null || true
